gestures.mdmPrompt: The tutor waves both arms excitedly while inviting students to join the adventure of addition.
The tutor points to an imaginary number line while demonstrating how to combine numbers with a clear gesture.
The tutor holds up both hands and counts fingers to engage students in practicing addition with their own objects.
The tutor opens their arms wide in excitement while checking if students found the correct answer to the addition problem.
The tutor emphasizes with their right hand while praising the students for their great work and enthusiasm in learning addition.
